name: andrej-karpathy-skills
description: Behavioral guidelines that reduce common LLM coding mistakes.

interface.shortDescription: Think first, simplify, edit surgically, and verify.
interface.longDescription: Karpathy-inspired coding guidelines covering explicit assumptions, minimal solutions, surgical changes, and goal-driven verification.
defaultPrompt: Apply the Karpathy guidelines to this coding task.
Review this change for overengineering and unrelated edits.
Turn this request into verifiable success criteria.
